summary: Multi-Tier Operator System & P1 Contact Settings fully verified. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All components working - Operators tab with Manager/Worker hierarchy, Create/Edit/Delete dialogs, P1 Contact Settings tab, role badges, and proper access control.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement suggested but not blocking

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns operator_role field
Backend: Login response includes operator_role in user object
Backend: GET /api/founder/operators - Founder sees all operators (managers + workers)
Backend: POST /api/founder/operators - Create worker as founder
Backend: POST /api/founder/operators - Create manager as founder
Backend: PUT /api/founder/operators/{id} - Edit operator
Backend: DELETE /api/founder/operators/{id} - Delete with password confirmation
Backend: Manager cannot create another manager (403 expected)
Backend: Manager can create worker
Backend: Manager sees only workers (not managers)
Backend: GET /api/founder/p1-contact-settings-public - No auth required
Backend: GET /api/founder/p1-contact-settings - Staff can read
Backend: PUT /api/founder/p1-contact-settings - Founder can update
Backend: Login handles invalid credentials correctly
Backend: Cleanup test operators
Backend: Operators have operator_role field in list
Frontend: Operators tab shows 'Operations Team' header
Frontend: Operators tab shows 'Operations Managers' section (Founder view)
Frontend: Operators tab shows 'Operations Workers' section
Frontend: Manager role badge displayed correctly
Frontend: Worker role badge displayed correctly
Frontend: Add Operator button opens create dialog
Frontend: Create operator dialog has role selector (Manager/Worker) for founder
Frontend: Create dialog has all form fields (username, password, first_name, last_name, email, phone, title, notes)
Frontend: Edit operator dialog works with pre-populated data
Frontend: Edit dialog has Save Changes button
Frontend: Delete operator dialog requires password confirmation
Frontend: Delete dialog has Remove button with password input
Frontend: P1 Contact Settings tab accessible from Founder portal sidebar
Frontend: P1 Contact Settings shows email, phone, chat_enabled fields
Frontend: P1 Contact Settings has Save Settings button
Frontend: Public P1 contact settings API returns email, phone, chat_enabled
critical_code_review_comments: Operators tab correctly separates managers and workers with visual hierarchy
Role badges (Manager=yellow, Worker=blue) provide clear visual differentiation
Create operator dialog has proper role selector for founder (managers can only create workers)
Delete confirmation requires password - good security practice
P1 Contact Settings public endpoint allows sealed account screen to display emergency contacts without auth
Login flow properly handles sealed account response with transitioned_at timestamp
All operator CRUD operations have proper audit logging
seed_data_creation: Test operators with TEST_ prefix created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tier operator system verified: (1) OperatorsTab.js shows separate sections for Managers and Workers with role badges; (2) Founder can create/edit/delete any operator; (3) Managers can only manage workers; (4) P1ContactSettingsTab.js allows founder to configure emergency contact info; (5) SealedAccountScreen.js shows P1 contact options when transitioned benefactor tries to log in; (6) Public API /api/founder/p1-contact-settings-public requires no auth; (7) Delete operator requires password confirmation for security.

backend_apis: POST /api/founder/operators - Create manager (founder) and worker (founder + manager)
GET /api/founder/operators - Founder sees all, Manager sees workers only
PUT /api/founder/operators/{id} - Edit operator with proper access control
frontend_components: Create operator dialog with role selector
